programs.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programs.desc: A teen football player suffers a stroke; a doctor remembers his first major trauma in the 1970s; a doctor tries to figure out what causes a patient's abdominal pain; a man who is run over twice by his wife.

programs.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programs.desc: 9/11 trauma was the trigger for one woman; the lasting effects of a brain hemorrhage.

programs.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programs.desc: Debbie lost the company of her four children to hoarding; Chip's family of six is forced to live in sixteen hundred square feet of living space.

programs.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programs.desc: Medical responders were not able to get in Renee's front door after she had fallen unconscious in her home.

programs.title: Save My Skin
programs.sub_title: It Looks Like It's Gonna Pop!
programs.desc: Dr. Emma tackles a large golf ball sized cyst on Dave's cheek that is ruining his life; and one of Adam's multiple lipomas turns out to be a rare medical first for Dr. Emma, which is no mean feat!

programs.title: Save My Skin
programs.sub_title: It Just Makes You Feel Ugly
programs.desc: Chrissie had a lipoma removed 14 years ago, but it's grown back bigger than ever; it turns out to be a tricky lipoma; and Dr Emma has an ingenious plan to get rid of the big wart on Sian's foot.
